question: Will an Iranian ballistic missile strike the US/UK base at Diego Garcia before June 1st 2026?
reason: No evidence of Iranian missile activity targeting Diego Garcia since March 2026.
evidence: March 20, 2026: Iran launched two ballistic missiles at Diego Garcia; both failed to hit the target.
May 25, 2026: U.S. military conducted 'self-defense' strikes in southern Iran, targeting missile launch sites and boats.
May 27, 2026: No reports of Iranian missile activity targeting Diego Garcia.
No official statements from U.S. or U.K. military authorities confirming any new missile threats to Diego Garcia.
searchQueries: Iran ballistic missile strike Diego Garcia May 2026
